title: Hah! Ueuh~
description: Adds the ability, "Return By Death", from Re:Zero!
body:
_"Imagine caving through the darkness in Hardcore Mode... suddenly you hear an arrow notch, and before you can react... It hits. **"Hah! Ueuh~"** You awake at a moment in the past, as if time itself has rewound!"_ - Noii

---

## **Here's a Video Demonstration of the mod!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RUsdzQGjKWA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Current Additions**

This mod currently adds in the ability of "Return by Death", an ability used by the character Natsuki Subaru, in Re:Zero
This ability is granted to everyone on start, and throughout your playthrough, it will occasionally set "Checkpoints"
If a player dies at any time, the entire world will get reverted back to the time of the Checkpoint.

Upon Death, you will notice, Your health, hunger, and inventory will be fully reset back.

The positions of any mobs will also be returned, as well as the lives of any mobs taken during.
The world itself also gets returned, including time, as well as any broken or placed blocks!

By default, Checkpoints are set every 30 seconds, as well as whenever a player sleeps, or gets an achievement.

# **Gamerules / Commands**
This mod comes with a handful of configurable Gamerules, and some commands!

---

**/rezero checkpoint** - Set a manual checkpoint when ran

**/rezero returnbydeath (player) (true/false)** - Sets only specific players to trigger Return by Death _(If allReturnByDeath gamerule is false)_

**/rezero revive (player)** - Manually revives a player when playing in hardcore mode.

**/halfheart** - Sets you to half a heart to easily setup insta-death

---

**/gamerule randomCheckpoints** - Enables/Disables the timer checkpoints

**/gamerule achievementCheckpoints** - Enables/Disables the achievement checkpoints

**/gamerule sleepCheckpoints** - Enables/Disables the sleeping checkpoints

**/gamerule notifyCheckpoints** - Sends a message when a checkpoint gets set

**/gamerule checkpointTime** - Changes the interval between timer checkpoints

**/gamerule allReturnByDeath** - Enabled/Disables if all players trigger Return by Death

**/gamerule checkpointRandomness** - Adds a bit of randomness between the checkpoint times (+/-)

**/gamerule checkpointChance** - Changes the chance of a checkpoint actually setting (1-100)

I do not currently have plans to turn this into anything more, but if it gains some attention, I might!_
